_comment: NOTE FOR AI AGENTS: Status Description Tone Guidelines - This game uses simple, nonpretentious language that matches the protagonist's practical character. Descriptions should be: (1) Simple and direct, (2) Functional - tells you what it does, (3) No flowery fantasy language, (4) What a practical person would say. GOOD: 'Burns weaken attacks', 'Moves cost extra', 'Builds up to critical dose'. BAD: 'Searing flames weaken your resolve', 'The icy grip saps your strength', 'Toxins course through your veins'. Think: what would a straightforward person call this? Keep mechanicsDetails accurate and detailed, but description concise and unpretentious.

statusEffects.name: Burn
statusEffects.mechanicsDetails: Deals 6.25% max HP damage per turn (does not scale with stacks). Reduces physical attack by 20% per stack. Minimum 1 damage.
statusEffects.notes: Consistent damage, stacks mainly affect debuff and duration

statusEffects.name: Bleed
statusEffects.description: 3.125% max HP damage per stack per turn. Scales with stacks (max: 12.5% at 4 stacks)
statusEffects.notes: Lower initial damage but scales hard with stacks

statusEffects.name: Freeze
statusEffects.description: Minor movement penalty (6.25% per stack). Moves consume 2/3/4/5x usage based on stacks (0/1/2/3/4 stacks)
statusEffects.notes: Resource drain mechanic - you can still act but burn through move uses faster

statusEffects.name: Gravity
statusEffects.description: Slows movement by 25% per stack, hampers attacks (accuracy -12.5%, agility -12.5%)
statusEffects.notes: slows game speed and sounds by movementPenalty/2 when hovering affected unit(s)

statusEffects.name: Void
statusEffects.description: Locks a random move per stack. At 3+ stacks, also locks a passive ability
statusEffects.notes: Original design had max 3 stacks, updated to 4 for consistency

statusEffects.name: Bugle
statusEffects.description: Take 1 extra damage per stack from Heraldic-type moves

statusEffects.name: Poison
statusEffects.description: Reduces agility, movement speed, and strength by 12.5% per stack. At 4 stacks: critical dose triggers 25% max HP pure damage and clears the status
statusEffects.notes: Kinda like Dark Souls bleed - no DoT until max stacks, then big burst

statusEffects.name: Shocked
statusEffects.mechanicsDetails: 25% chance per stack to fail when attempting an action (max 100% at 4 stacks). Reduces movement speed by 12.5% per stack.

statusEffects.name: Wither
statusEffects.description: Reduces max HP by 12.5% per stack
statusEffects.notes: Occult-themed debuff - currentHP does not regenerate after effect clears

statusEffects.name: Vulnerable
statusEffects.description: Take 12.5% extra damage per stack from physical sources
